at_ijaz_we_work_on_providing_modern_serv: At Ijaz, we work on providing modern services that meet your daily needs with ease and reliability.
our_goal_is_to_save_you_time_and_effort: Our goal is to save you time and effort through an integrated platform that combines quality and speed, keeping you always closer to what you need.
ijaz_is_a_national_digital_platform_that:
Ijaz is a national digital platform that aims to connect service seekers with providers within an integrated and flexible environment. We facilitate access to practical solutions and strengthen cooperation to ensure quality outputs and fast delivery.

We believe in enabling individuals and companies to turn their ideas into reality through advanced tools and professional services that meet the needs of various sectors. We commit to delivering a reliable experience based on efficiency, innovation, and transparency.

At Ijaz, we strive to be the first choice for those who want to complete their work efficiently, forming a bridge between ambition and achievement according to the highest professional standards.
at_ejaz_we_believe_that_technology_is_th:
At Ijaz we believe technology is the key to the digital future. From this perspective, we strive to build a leading electronic platform that transforms e-services into a unique and exceptional experience. We provide innovative, secure technological solutions that meet the needs of individuals and institutions and support both public and private sectors, serving as a pivotal point in achieving their goals efficiently and reliably.

Our mission is to empower everyone to access integrated services that combine speed, quality, and professionalism, with an emphasis on building a safe digital environment that enhances trust between parties. We provide modern technical tools that facilitate collaboration, open the door to innovation, and ensure smooth transactions without complication.

We also aspire for Ijaz to be a true driver of positive change, contributing to national digital transformation and inspiring individuals and institutions to adopt smart solutions as a strategic choice for accomplishing their work. Our mission goes beyond providing services — it extends to building a brighter digital future that balances technology and humanity, fosters creativity and innovation, and enables everyone to achieve their aspirations with confidence and effectiveness.
to_make_ijaz_the_leading_and_primary_des:
To make Ijaz the first and leading destination in the world of e-services and digital mediation, ensuring every user’s right to a fair and safe environment. We aim to build an integrated system that makes it easy to complete work and achieves balance between service seekers and providers through reliable mechanisms that protect rights and increase trust.

We commit to keeping up with technological developments and providing innovative solutions that deliver high-quality services at competitive prices, with ease of use and continuous 24/7 support. We believe user satisfaction is the basis of our success, so we adhere to principles of transparency and credibility in every interaction.

With the spirit of innovation and creativity, Ijaz seeks to establish a prosperous digital future that opens new horizons and inspires generations to participate actively in building an intelligent society based on trust and achievement.
empowering_individuals_and_organizations:
Empowering individuals and organizations through a comprehensive digital platform that facilitates access to services and completes transactions efficiently.

Supporting service providers by offering wider opportunities to showcase their work to the public and private sectors, and enhancing their position through golden verification and privileges.

Simplifying the user journey with a flexible interface, an easy dashboard, and precise tracking options for service stages until delivery and evaluation.

Strengthening trust and transparency through secure payment systems and direct communication channels that ensure the rights of all parties.

Contributing to national digital transformation in line with Saudi Vision 2030 by providing innovative electronic services managed remotely and available 24/7.

Improving the efficiency of e-services to meet the needs of individuals, government entities, and private organizations while keeping pace with the requirements of the digital future.

Encouraging creativity and professionalism by creating a fair competitive environment that motivates skill development and delivery of value-added services.

Building a smart, prosperous society that relies on technology as a main tool for sustainable growth and development.
policies_and_privacy_on_the_platform: Policies and Privacy on the Platform
terms_and_conditions_of_service_provider: Terms and Conditions of Service Provider Authorization

If the client requests authorization for the service provider to deal with government agencies or complete transactions on their behalf, the authorization must be made exclusively inside Ijaz platform via the application’s private chat system.

It is strictly forbidden to carry out any procedures or exchange documents or information related to authorization outside the Ijaz platform.

The client and the service provider bear full legal responsibility for the accuracy of the data and documents submitted under the authorization.

Ijaz platform acts only as a technical intermediary and assumes no legal or financial responsibility for any action carried out under the authorization or outside the application’s scope.

If any of these conditions are violated, the platform reserves the right to suspend or cancel the account of the provider or the client and take necessary legal action.

Declaration: I acknowledge that I agree to these authorization terms and that the authorization is conducted only within Ijaz platform limits.
how_to_use_the_agency_in_ijaz: How to Use the Agency in Ijaz
how_to_use_the_agency_in_ijaz_content:
The client logs into their account in the app.

They open a private chat with the service provider and choose the "Request Agency" option.

They fill in the required data and documents through the electronic form inside the system.

The service provider reviews the data and confirms receipt of the authorization through the same chat.

The authorization is officially approved within the app, and any process outside it is not recognized.

Prices:

Prices are determined according to the provider’s price offer on the platform; the client reviews and approves before the start of execution.

Notice:

It is strictly forbidden to exchange any documents or execute authorization procedures outside the platform. Any violation is the responsibility of both client and provider. The platform acts only as a technical intermediary and bears no legal or financial obligations resulting from the authorization or price negotiations.
terms_of_use_for_the_real_estate_marketp: Terms of Use for the Real Estate Marketplace
Terms of Use for the Real Estate Marketplace in Ijaz

Official License: No user is allowed to add a property unless they hold a valid license issued by the Saudi Real Estate Authority.

Legal responsibility: The user assumes full responsibility for the accuracy of the data and documents submitted when listing the property, including images, specifications, and prices.

Compliance with regulations: All advertisements must comply with Saudi regulations and rules related to sale and rental of real estate.

Platform follow-up: Ijaz acts as a technical intermediary to facilitate publishing, communication, and follow-up inside the app, and does not bear legal responsibility for the validity of the license or content published outside the platform.

Account cancellation or suspension: In case of violation of any of these terms, Ijaz reserves the right to suspend or cancel the account and take legal actions as necessary.

Rules

For service seekers:

  • Write an accurate description when requesting a service.
  • Specify a budget and delivery time (optional).
  • Communicate via the platform only.
  • Rate the provider after the delivery.

For service providers:

  • Provide a clear and complete offer.
  • Commit to deadlines and work quality.
  • Communicate via the platform only.
  • Respect the service seeker.

Applicable law:

These terms are subject to the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

Amendments:

The platform may modify terms and conditions at any time; the change becomes effective upon approval. Users should review terms regularly.

Ijaz commission:

  • A 10% commission is deducted from the provider (including deposit fee commission).
  • The provider may not request commission payment from the seeker.
  • The provider must include the commission in their offer.
  • Payments are transferred only after work is delivered and approved.

Notes:

  • These terms are subject to change at any time.
  • It is recommended to read them carefully before using the platform.
  • For inquiries, contact customer service.
  • The platform may grant golden verification to trusted entities even if they have not met all specified criteria.

Tips

For service seekers:

  • Write a precise project description.
  • Set a budget and deadline.
  • Communicate clearly with the provider.
  • Rate the provider after completion.

For providers:

  • Provide competitive offers.
  • Adhere to deadlines.
  • Deliver high-quality work.
  • Communicate effectively with the service seeker.

In conclusion:

Ijaz aims to provide a safe and fair environment for service seekers and freelancers. By adhering to these terms, all users can make the most of the platform and its services.
privacy_policy_content:
Introduction:

This privacy statement explains how Ijaz collects, uses, protects, and shares your personal data when you use the platform. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the confidentiality of your information. Using our platform indicates your full agreement to this policy. If you do not agree, please stop using the platform.

How data is used

Service delivery:

  • Connecting you with service providers.
  • Processing your requests and transactions.
  • Providing technical support and customer service.
  • Enabling government and private services.

Improving services:

  • Analyzing data to improve user experience.
  • Developing new features.
  • Customizing the interface and user experience according to your interests.

Marketing purposes:

  • Sending notifications and advertising messages.
  • Providing promotional offers and special campaigns.

Legal purposes:

  • Complying with applicable laws and regulations in Saudi Arabia.
  • Resolving disputes and protecting the rights of the platform and users.

Data sharing

Your data may be shared only in the following cases:

With service providers:

Such as payment gateways, shipping companies, and technical support providers.

With third parties:

Such as advertising and analytics companies, in ways that do not violate your privacy.

In legal cases:

When complying with court orders or responding to official government requests.

Privacy options

Edit information:

You can access and update your personal data at any time.

Delete data:

You can request deletion of your personal data; we will process that in line with legal obligations.

Security:

Ijaz applies high technical and administrative security standards to protect your data from unauthorized access, use, or sharing. We periodically review and update security procedures to ensure effectiveness and protect users from potential risks.

We confirm that your data on Ijaz is processed confidentially and is not sold or shared for illegal purposes.

Changes to the privacy statement:

Ijaz reserves the right to modify or update this privacy policy from time to time according to legal and technical developments. Saudi privacy and data laws continue to apply.

In conclusion:

At Ijaz, your privacy is a top priority. We are committed to protecting your data and ensuring that your use of our services takes place in a secure and trusted environment. By using our services you give us your trust, and we commit to maintaining it with responsibility and transparency.

policies_and_privacy_in_the_platform: Policies and Privacy in the Platform
policies_and_privacy_in_the_platform_con:
Terms of Use:

Introduction:

Welcome to Ijaz platform, where we aim to create a secure and reliable e-commerce environment that helps service providers find projects and helps service seekers find distinguished professionals. We strive to achieve these goals by adhering to the following terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any of these terms, please do not use Ijaz or create an account. By using our platform, you express your full agreement to these terms. We hope you find Ijaz useful and enjoy a positive experience working with us. If you have any questions or concerns, please contact our support team. We are here to help and ensure you get the best value from our platform.

Objective:

Ijaz aims to connect service seekers with distinguished service providers to complete various services and projects.

Definitions:

  • Service Seeker: An individual or organization from the public or private sector seeking freelance services.
  • Service Provider: An individual or organization that offers services through the platform to seekers.
  • Service: The opportunity provided to service seekers to find distinguished providers to complete projects and the opportunity for providers to find suitable projects matching their skills.

Terms and conditions of use

Registration:

Users must register on the platform to create an account, and the provided information must be accurate. Creating multiple accounts is not allowed.

Legal age:

Users must be at least 15 years old.

Account blocking:

Ijaz reserves the right to block or cancel accounts that violate the terms of use. Examples include:

  • Using forged or stolen identities.
  • Using stolen payment cards.
  • Acting as a middleman in projects.
  • Lack of seriousness from an employer.
  • Harming the platform or its users.
  • Communicating outside the platform or posting direct contact links.
  • Incomplete work without a valid reason.
  • Publishing unfinished work.
  • Impersonation.
  • Creating multiple accounts.
  • Publishing fake projects.

Payment:

Payments are made through the platform's secure payment system. Payment can be made by credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, Mada, etc.) or via bank transfer to the platform’s account after sending the receipt to support.

Provider withdrawals:

Providers can withdraw earnings after surpassing 300 SAR.

Wallet refunds for seekers:

Refunds are allowed with deduction of bank transfer fees only.

Content handling:

The platform may stop any ads, offers, or reviews that may harm the platform or its users, and may block some services if they cause harm.

No legal responsibility:

  • The platform is not a party to any contractual relationship outside the platform.
  • The platform is not responsible for any losses or damages resulting from using the platform.
  • The user is responsible for the accuracy of their data.
  • The terms of use are subject to Saudi law.

Service interruptions:

The platform management makes every effort to provide continuous service, but errors or temporary interruptions may occur. Users are expected to be patient until service is restored.

Use and sharing of information:

All information is handled confidentially and may be used to develop services or shared with third parties, and may be disclosed if there is a court order.

Content moderation:

  • The platform monitors any content entered by subscribers.
  • It may delete or modify any materials that violate terms.
  • It may remove any ad that contains direct contact information.

Rules

Service seeker:

  • Provide an accurate description when requesting a service.
  • Specify budget and execution time (optional).
  • Communicate via the platform only.
  • Rate the provider after work completion.

Service provider:

  • Provide a clear and complete offer.
  • Commit to deadlines and the quality of work.
  • Communicate via the platform only.
  • Respect the service seeker.

Applicable law:

These terms are subject to the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

Amendments:

The platform may amend terms and conditions at any time, effective upon approval. Users should review terms regularly.

Ijaz commission:

  • A 10% commission is deducted from the provider (including deposit commission).
  • The provider may not ask the seeker to pay the commission.
  • The provider must include the commission in their offer.
  • Transfers are made only after delivering the work and receiving approval.

Notes:

  • These terms may change anytime.
  • It is advised to read them carefully before using the platform.
  • For inquiries, contact customer service.
  • The platform may grant golden verification to trusted entities even if they haven’t met all criteria.

Tips

For service seekers:

  • Write a precise project description.
  • Set budget and delivery time.
  • Communicate clearly with the provider.
  • Rate the provider after completion.

For providers:

  • Offer competitive proposals.
  • Adhere to schedules.
  • Deliver high-quality work.
  • Communicate effectively.

In conclusion:

Ijaz aims to provide a safe and fair working environment for seekers and freelancers. By following these terms, all users can make the best use of the platform and its services.

with_ijaz_we_guarantee:
With Ijaz we guarantee funds so you can focus on your work as a trusted escrow facilitating transactions with confidence and security.

Why Ijaz Guarantee?

Use Ijaz Guarantee to secure your funds and clients reliably. With Ijaz Guarantee, you ensure protection of parties’ funds in transactions you manage without interference from any other party.

Ijaz Guarantee simplifies your work as an intermediary, company, or individual for settlement and handling clients' funds easily and securely.

Ijaz Guarantee provides protection and assurance for your clients' funds.

Ijaz Guarantee saves time and effort in your operations.

The secure intermediary for dealings between individuals
easiest_way_to_get_a_job: The easiest way to get your new job with Ijaz Recruitment
ijaz_is_one_of_the_biggest_platforms_spe:
Ijaz is one of the largest Saudi platforms specialized in posting job vacancies and employment opportunities within the Kingdom, connecting job seekers with companies and institutions, and providing direct and easy application to government jobs.

✅ If you are a job seeker:

  • Browse thousands of job opportunities across various fields and specialties.
  • Apply in simple and quick steps without complications.
  • The service is completely free to support citizens and residents.
  • Priority is given to national competencies in line with Saudi Vision 2030.
  • Ability to apply for government jobs such as military sectors and other official entities (via a dedicated government jobs icon for a small fee).

✅ If you are an employer or organization:

  • Post vacancies in your organization for free.
  • Reach a wide segment of job seekers quickly and efficiently.
  • Easy tools to manage job applications and select the most suitable candidates.

💡 With Ijaz, searching for a job or an employee became easier, faster, and more professional.

Whether you are applying for a government job with a small fee or a private job for free, or you are an employer seeking new talents, Ijaz is the ideal solution for you.

📌 Note:

The service is provided by Ijaz for free, except the government job application icon which requires a small fee.
manage_attendance_and_departure: Manage attendance & departure and monitor employee working hours – Ijaz Attendance

Ijaz Attendance platform provides an integrated solution for managing employee attendance accurately and transparently, suitable for all companies and sectors.

System features:

  • An innovative and easy-to-use system for managing employee attendance with accuracy and transparency.
  • Regular updates to ensure utilization of all new features.
  • A modern design compatible with the latest web and mobile technologies.
  • Recording attendance and departure with face biometrics and location determination measuring the distance from the company premises.
  • Managing leaves, absences, and approvals directly via the app.
  • Accurate monthly reports to ensure employee rights and motivate them.
  • Easy follow-up of information and printing outputs with minimal effort.

💡 Ijaz Attendance is the best solution for managing employee attendance with high efficiency, ensuring everyone’s rights and increasing productivity inside any establishment.

📌 Note: The service is offered free for companies and individuals and all sectors for a limited time.

customer_review_title: A great experience in website development
customer_review_body: I requested a website for my project via Ijaz, and the result was excellent! The team is professional and delivers on time.
we_answer_your_question: We answer your questions and inquiries
question_1_header: How to start with Ijaz Platform?
question_1_body:
1. Download the Ijaz app or visit our website.
  2. Choose the type of account that suits you.
  3. Create a new account or log in if you have a previous account.
  4. You can enter as a guest without registering, but some features will not be available.
If you are a service provider:
  • Select your account type: Individual or Company.
  • Enter your data and attach required documents to be approved as a provider.
  • Add a profile summary and choose a profile picture.
  • Specify the types of services you provide:
  • Governmental: for Saudis only, citizens' children, foreign investors, and Saudi or non-Saudi commercial records provided there is an investment license record and an active bank account.
  • Private services: open to everyone.
  • After completion, we review your request and activate your account (approval may take time).
  • After activation, you can add your services and start interacting with customers.
If you are a service seeker:
  • Enter your basic information.
  • Add a brief about you and a profile picture (optional).
  • Top up your wallet according to your needs; you can pay according to the provider’s price offer for the requested service.
  • Search for a suitable provider:
  • You can post a public request and view offers from providers and compare them.
  • Or request a private service from a specific provider and view their ratings and works and negotiate or accept their offer directly.

Finally: Enjoy the fast and secure services provided by Ijaz platform
question_2_header: As a service seeker, how can I get a service on Ijaz?
question_2_body:
Create an account:
  • Make sure you are logged into Ijaz with an active account.
  • If you don't have an account, create one using your phone number.
  • Complete your profile information accurately.
Browse services:
  • From the main menu, choose 'Search for Service'.
  • Use the search bar to find the service you want.
  • You can also browse the different service categories available.
Select a service:
  • Once you find the desired service, click its title to see more details.
  • Be sure to read the service description carefully, including details, skills and prices if available.
  • Check the provider’s ratings and previous customer feedback.
Contact the provider:
  • If you want to request a service from the provider, you can create an order and then complete the order details.
  • Then you both can communicate through chat.
  • Send a message to the provider explaining your needs and requirements.
  • Discuss service details, price, and delivery time with the provider.
Track service progress:
  • You can follow the progress through your Ijaz dashboard.
  • Communicate with the provider for questions or modification requests.
  • Rate the service and leave feedback after completion via chat.
  • You can also post a public request on the platform to receive multiple offers and choose the most suitable one.
question_3_header: As a service provider, how can I offer my services on Ijaz?
question_3_body:
- Build a convincing profile:
  • Complete your profile fully and attach all required documents.
  • Showcase experience: clearly specify the services you provide and your areas of expertise.
  • Use relevant keywords throughout your profile to make it discoverable by potential seekers searching for specific services.
- Improve your service listings:
  • Create clear and attractive listings: write informative and engaging descriptions for each service.
  • Clearly specify deliverables, pricing, and any unique aspects of your service.
  • Use high-quality images to showcase your work.
  • Classify services accurately within the platform categories to help customers find your offers when browsing or searching.
  • Set competitive pricing: research market prices for similar services and set competitive rates that reflect your value while remaining attractive to clients.
- Boost your online presence:
  • Promote your profile on social media and professional networks by sharing your Ijaz profile link.
- Deliver exceptional service:
  • Communicate effectively: keep clear and continuous communication with clients during the project lifecycle. Respond quickly to inquiries, address concerns, and provide regular updates.
  • Meet deadlines and exceed expectations: consistently deliver high-quality work within agreed timelines and go the extra mile to provide added value.
  • Encourage feedback: request client reviews after project completion and use feedback to improve your services and maintain a positive reputation.
question_4_body:
- Wallet management:
  • Ijaz platform provides a secure wallet for both seekers and providers.
  • Access your wallet to view balance, track transactions, see operation history, and manage payment methods.
- Funding the account:
  • Providers and seekers can fund their wallets using different methods such as credit cards or bank transfers with receipt attachment.
  • These funds are used to pay for services purchased on the platform.
- Making payments:
  • Once you approve the provider’s work and the project, the balance is transferred from the escrow to the provider's account from your wallet directly.
- Provider withdrawals:
  • Providers can request withdrawal of earnings from their wallets to their bank accounts after reaching an amount greater than 300 SAR.
- Refunds for seekers:
  • If you face issues with the freelancer’s work or service, you can request a refund through the dispute resolution process on Ijaz according to platform policies and privacy rules.
  • Explain the problem clearly and provide any supporting evidence via a chat report.
- Processing refunds and withdrawals:
  • Ijaz will review your refund or withdrawal request.
  • The platform may contact both parties via chat as a third party to gather information and make a fair decision.
  • If approved, Ijaz processes the refund or withdrawal and transfers funds back to your bank account.
  • Processing time may vary depending on the payment method used.
question_5_body: - Ijaz commission is deducted from the service provider, not from the seeker, and is 10% of each completed order.
question_6_body: - Yes, Ijaz is committed to protecting user data. The platform uses advanced security technologies to prevent fraud and hacking.
question_7_header: How does the request and delivery mechanism work on the platform?
question_7_body:
- Placing an order:
  • Once you find a suitable provider and agree on project details, you can place the order formally.
  • You need to provide clear instructions and specifications to ensure the final delivered work meets requirements.
  • Ijaz may also require you to top up your account to secure the provider’s services.
- Tracking progress:
  • Ijaz provides convenient ways to track your project's progress.
  • Communicate with the provider directly through the platform’s chat system.
- Delivery and acceptance:
  • Upon project completion, the provider delivers the final product or service.
  • You have the opportunity to review the delivered work to ensure it meets expectations.
  • If satisfied, accept and rate the provider through chat.
  • If not satisfied, request revisions from the provider through chat.
question_8_body:
- Promotions:
  • Service providers can create promotional offers (discounts) for their services on Ijaz for a specified period and a nominal fee to reach customers faster.
  • Service seekers can browse all offers and filter them as needed and request an offer directly.
- Advertisements:
  • Providers can create ads for their services on Ijaz for a specified period and a small fee to increase visibility.
  • Seekers can browse all ads and request the ad directly by clicking it to be taken to the provider’s profile.
question_9_header: When can I receive the golden verification as a provider?
question_9_body:
- Conditions for obtaining golden verification for providers:
  • Providers receive a notification after meeting Ijaz's golden verification requirements, which include number of completed orders, overall rating, and the number of reviews.
- Benefits of golden verification:
  • As a golden verified provider, you gain a competitive advantage and stand out on the platform.
  • Golden verification acts as a certificate of exceptional skills, experience, and continuous commitment to delivering high-quality work.
  • It indicates your dedication and professionalism and builds trust among potential clients, making you a preferred choice.
  • Verified providers receive discount vouchers to be used for promotions or ads.
question_10_header: How are disputes resolved between a provider and a seeker?
question_10_body:
- Reporting issues:
  • If you encounter problems or disputes with a provider, report the issue to Ijaz via chat.
  • Provide clear details and any supporting evidence you have.
  • The platform will review the case and seek a resolution.
- Ijaz mediation:
  • Ijaz acts as a neutral mediator between the seeker and provider.
  • We review evidence, gather information from both accounts, and attempt to find an acceptable solution for both parties.
  • Ijaz can intervene as a third party in the chat if circumstances require it.
- Final decision:
  • If mediation fails, Ijaz may make a final decision based on the situation evaluation.
  • This decision may include refunding your money, suspending the provider’s account, or other appropriate measures.
question_11_header: How does Ijaz Guarantee (escrow) work in detail?
question_11_body:
1. Login or create an account:
    • Sign in or create a new account on the Ijaz app.
  2. Access Ijaz Guarantee:
    • Inside the app, tap the Guarantee icon.
  3. Add transaction details:
    • Enter full details of the requested service.
    • Specify the delivery time or let the transfer be automatic upon successful completion.
    • Enter the total amount.
    • Provide the other party’s mobile number (provider or seeker depending on the transaction).
  4. Approval and terms:
    • Read terms and conditions.
    • Confirm secure payment via Ijaz Guarantee.
  5. Other party’s approval:
    • After the other party agrees, a detailed invoice is issued which includes:
      • Total amount
      • Ijaz Guarantee fee of 5%
      • Secure third-party payment guarantee
  6. Transfer of funds:
    • If the service is successfully completed, the transfer to the recipient is immediate.
    • If there is no dispute, the transfer is automatic after 3 days.

This way, Ijaz Guarantee ensures the rights of both parties and makes the payment process secure and transparent.
question_12_header: What does attendance & departure mean in Ijaz app?
question_12_body:
• Ijaz offers an attendance & departure service for companies and individuals to ensure parties’ rights.
  • How it works:
    1. The company registers itself first in the app and adds employee data.
    2. It gives the employee a mode or code to record attendance and departure.
    3. The employee records attendance and departure directly from the app according to exact location and hours.
  • After login, the employee can use all app services, not just attendance & departure.
  • The service is completely free for companies and individuals, with monthly recording of absences and attendances including all employee details.
question_13_header: Inquiries about the Jobs icon in Ijaz
question_13_body:
• Ijaz provides job postings for free.
  • You can search for jobs by:
  • Job type or field
  • Desired salary
  • Geographical location that suits you
  • The service is dedicated to supporting youth and women fully.
  • Whether you are a client, provider, or company, you can add job vacancies yourself with required specifications without fees.
question_14_body: Ijaz is an official and licensed Saudi platform that brings together government and private services in one place and offers professional digital solutions that help you complete your work quickly and easily. Our platform is considered the first destination for those seeking e-services and distinguished opportunities, and we provide thousands of successful options under one roof.
